events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. Missing hanger nails (empty holes) reduce the connector's rated load capacity below its listed/tested value per Simpson catalog and ESR requirements referenced under IRC R602.3/R301.1.3 — a load-path life-safety issue that must be corrected (holes filled with the specified fastener) and re-inspected before the framing is closed in.
